label: Basaltwind Quarters
description: Basaltwind Quarters constitutes a compact sleeping cabin set off the Basaltwind Saltway, framed by a low pressure door and gasketed seams to preserve the vessel’s sealed interior. The walls and ceiling carry the same corrosion-tolerant plating as the corridor, their surfaces etched with fine salt scoring and interrupted by lidded conduit runs. A built-in berth and recessed lockers are fastened flush to the structure, reducing exposed hardware and limiting surfaces where grit accumulates. Thick-glass lamp housings cast a hard, pale light that keeps the room stark and functional under Brineshade’s abrasive conditions.
